ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Look for updates when Obsidian starts.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 启动时检查更新。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Install newer versions automatically after startup checks.
ast.target: 启动检查后自动安装新版本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If the target plugin is already enabled, try to reload it so new code applies immediately.
ast.target: 如果目标插件已启用，请尝试重新加载它，以便新代码立即生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Check for updates or install now.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create a new source entry with the default simple fields.
ast.target: 使用默认简单字段创建新的源条目。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use this source for checks and installs.
ast.target: 将此源用于检查和安装。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Read from the remote manifest after the first successful test, check, or install.
ast.target: 在首次成功测试、检查或安装后，从远程清单读取。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Verified path 1. Use the repository releases page URL on your local IP/LAN host.
ast.target: 验证路径 1. 在您的本地 IP/LAN 主机上使用仓库发布页面 URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Verified path 2. Use the repository releases page URL exposed through your Tailscale address.
ast.target: 验证路径 2. 通过您的 Tailscale 地址使用仓库发布页面 URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Test the verified URLs, install now, or remove this source.
ast.target: 测试已验证的 URL、立即安装或移除此源。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 安装/更新后自动重新加载

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 跨所有已启用的源运行

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Dev Loader Updater: no enabled sources configured
ast.target: Dev Loader Updater：未配置已启用的源

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Dev Loader Updater: all enabled sources are up to date
ast.target: Dev Loader Updater：所有已启用的源均为最新

ast.name: name
ast.source: Install or update all configured plugin sources
ast.target: 安装或更新所有已配置的插件源

ast.name: name
ast.source: Check all configured plugin sources for updates
ast.target: 检查所有已配置的插件源是否有更新

ast.name: text
ast.source: Add two verified release URLs for a private plugin: one local network URL and one Tailscale URL.
ast.target: 为私有插件添加两个已验证的发布 URL：一个本地网络 URL 和一个 Tailscale URL。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The loader reads the manifest, detects the plugin id automatically, and tries whichever verified URL works first.
ast.target: 加载器读取清单，自动检测插件 ID，并首先尝试哪个已验证的 URL 有效。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No sources yet. Add one and fill in the local network URL and/or Tailscale URL.
ast.target: 尚无源。添加一个并填写本地网络 URL 和/或 Tailscale URL。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Required here: a local network URL, a Tailscale URL, or both. The plugin id is detected automatically.
ast.target: 此处需要：本地网络 URL、Tailscale URL 或两者兼有。插件 ID 会自动检测。
